title: Trigger creation order affects query correctness
key_bug_features: Trigger creation order affects query correctness
bug_feature_seed: CREATE TABLE t0(a INTEGER, b INTEGER);
CREATE TRIGGER trg1 AFTER INSERT ON t0 BEGIN INSERT INTO log0 VALUES(new.a); END;
CREATE TRIGGER trg2 AFTER INSERT ON t0 BEGIN DELETE FROM log0 WHERE x=new.a; END;
